mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_project_member (project_id, user_id, joined_at) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{userId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_project_member WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_project_member (project_id, user_id, joined_at) VALUES
(#{projectId}, #{userId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM sys_project_member WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND role = 'owner'

SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM sys_project_member WHERE project_id IN
#{pid}
